title: Sour Tender Ukrainian Butter Beans Curry
description: A tangy, keto‑friendly curry featuring tender butter beans, a hint of lemon, and a smoky tandoor finish – perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor or grill to 200°C (400°F).
In a small bowl, mix the paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper to create a spice rub.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, then add the butter and let it melt.
Sauté the onion until translucent, then add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, letting it caramelize slightly.
Add the cooked butter beans, lemon juice, and the spice rub, tossing to coat evenly.
Transfer the mixture to a heat‑proof dish that fits in your tandoor, cover loosely with foil, and roast for 10–12 minutes, or until the beans are tender and flavors meld.
Remove from the tandoor, stir in the sour cream and dill, and let it sit for 2 minutes to thicken.
Serve hot, garnished with extra dill if desired. Use a small side of keto‑friendly greens to round out the meal.
